title: Gain Porn from epic day - Thank you MU, MSFT and ANET - Enjoy.
author: Avocado_Valentina
selftext: I got these MU leaps that are ITM before the run up to earnings, took a massive hit and then doubled down when it was at $350 a share cashed out like $800K in QQQ and took a leap. Did a YOLO big time. The cash is money from ANET I took off the table. The gains and cash were about where this portfolio was 18 months ago.
